compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Create tests/hooks/test-escalate-orchestrator.sh asserting preplanning SKILL.md has escalate_to_epic orchestrator handling and max_replan_cycles cycle bound check.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/hooks/test-escalate-orchestrator.sh
- [ ] Test fails (RED)
  Verify: ! bash tests/hooks/test-escalate-orchestrator.sh 2>/dev/null
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED markers
  Verify: grep 'preplanning/SKILL' .test-index | grep -q '\[test_'
